summary_sections.title: Overview
summary_sections.content_html: Buoyancy and Archimedes' Principle is a key topic in Fluid Mechanics for AP Physics 2.

summary_sections.title: Key Concepts
summary_sections.content_html: This lesson covers the fundamental principles of buoyancy and archimedes' principle.

summary_sections.title: Applications
summary_sections.content_html: Understanding buoyancy and archimedes' principle has applications in various areas of physics and engineering.
